name: Monster Shooter
short_description: Monster Shooter is a 3rd person point-based shooter in which you are humanity's last hope to protect your military base and the resources collected on the planet Hoperium against the Roncospheres. Take control and defend every part of the facility. Humanity depends on you!
detailed_description:
Embark on an epic intergalactic battle in "Monster Shooter." This thrilling third-person shooter immerses you in the role of humanity's last hope. Face off against the Roncosferas, voracious aliens originating from the distant planet Ronclumen, on a critical mission to protect the military base and precious resources of the planet Hoperium.

Take control of a brave space soldier, armed to the teeth with advanced technology. Face endless waves of enemies in a fight for survival, using strategy, skill and an impressive arsenal. Every point adds up in your quest to defend every vital part of the facility, as humanity waits with hope in the balance.

The destiny of humanity is in your hands. Accept the challenge, become the last line of defense and defend the future of civilization against the relentless Roncospheres. The planet is counting on you!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
*languages with full audio support
